caption.full:
Zoe Saldaña joins 'It's Complicated' as executive producer.

The narrative short film 'It's Complicated' will premiere at the HollyShorts Film Festival in August 2026. It follows a Palestinian-American screenwriter in Los Angeles whose online Arabic lessons blossom into a friendship with a poet in Gaza. Zoe Saldaña was moved by the film's tenderness and Iman Karram's commitment to telling an honest story.

Send this to a friend who loves powerful short films!

AI-assisted recap by The Screen Report.

#MovieNews #Hollywood #ItsComplicated #ZoeSaldana
caption.firstComment: What resonates most for me is how the film centers tenderness and humor in telling a Palestinian woman’s story — what moments do you hope to see that captured authentically?

facebook.text: Zoe Saldaña is now an executive producer for the short film 'It's Complicated.' The film, inspired by a real relationship, explores Palestinian womanhood and diasporic identity. It premieres at the HollyShorts Film Festival in August 2026. What do you think of this new role for Saldaña?

youtube.title: Zoe Saldaña Executive Produces 'It's Complicated'
youtube.description:
Zoe Saldaña has joined the short film 'It's Complicated' as an executive producer. Written by and starring Iman Karram, the film follows a Palestinian-American screenwriter and her online Arabic tutor. It premieres at the HollyShorts Film Festival in August 2026.

AI-assisted recap by The Screen Report.
